narrative: npm led with 94% of weekly downloads. Top package: @ai-rpg-engine/modules (455 this week). Top gainer: @mcptoolshop/sovereignty (+2942%; Δ353). Concentration: top 5 = 26.9%. Data is partial (degraded: npm) (3 packages used cached previous data).

narrativeLines.text: npm led with 94% of 5,527 weekly downloads followed by PyPI (6%).

recommendations.title: High portfolio concentration
recommendations.detail: Gini coefficient 0.85 indicates downloads are heavily concentrated in a few packages. Diversify promotion efforts across the portfolio.

recommendations.title: Heavy npm dependency
recommendations.detail: 94% of downloads come from npm. Consider cross-publishing to PyPI and NuGet to reduce single-registry risk.

recommendations.title: 19 packages gaining traction
recommendations.detail: @ai-rpg-engine/modules, @mcptoolshop/sovereignty, @ai-rpg-engine/starter-detective show organic growth with download spikes. Capitalize with blog posts, social media, or conference talks.

recommendations.title: 21 packages predicted to grow
recommendations.detail: Statistical models predict >20% growth in the next 7 days for @ai-rpg-engine/modules, @mcptoolshop/sovereignty, @ai-rpg-engine/starter-detective.

recommendations.title: 28 packages with repeated spikes
recommendations.detail: Multiple download spikes detected for @mcptoolshop/sovereignty, @ai-rpg-engine/starter-detective, @ai-rpg-engine/core. Could indicate bot activity, viral posts, or dependency adoption.

actionableAdvice.title: 75 packages in critical health
actionableAdvice.detail: sovereignty-game, mcpt, tool-compass, backpropagate, tool-scan scored below 20/100.
actionableAdvice.action: Review these packages for broken installs, outdated dependencies, or missing documentation. Consider archiving if no longer maintained.

actionableAdvice.title: 17 packages surging
actionableAdvice.action: Capitalize now: write a blog post, tweet, or submit to newsletters. Post a "Thank you" issue or discussion.

actionableAdvice.title: Portfolio concentration risk
actionableAdvice.detail: Gini coefficient 0.85 — downloads are concentrated in a few packages.
actionableAdvice.action: Promote underperforming packages in README badges, blog posts, and release notes of popular packages.

actionableAdvice.title: 94% of traffic from npm
actionableAdvice.detail: Single-registry dependency increases blast radius if npm has outages or policy changes.
actionableAdvice.action: Cross-publish key packages to PyPI (via wrapper) or NuGet. Add install instructions for all registries in READMEs.
